calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:50am
Judge Pro Tem Michael Lieberman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Susan Cogar, appears in Pro Per; Jack Bloom, Respondent appears in Pro Per. Appearing as witnesses with Ms. Cogar are: Able Arturb and Ken Hansell. Parties and witnesses, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
EXHA(1) Original lease
EXHA(2) Inclusive, group of color photos
EXHA(3) Contractor's agreement
EXHA(4) Copy of check, and a check-list
EXHR(A) Response to disputed charges
10:15am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Judgment Entered
